strategy: Three heads fight together: the Balance boss plus Fire and Myth heads. Bring an AoE hitter to clear all three at once, plus support to blade and Feint.
Hit Myth, Life, or Death - all three heads take boosted damage from these. The Balance head resists 80% Balance, so never attack into Balance.

Round 1 and every 4th round the Balance and Myth heads strip their harmful wards and buff (Donate Power, a heal, and three -40% towers on the Myth head). Time your burst just after this window so your Feints and traps are not wiped.
Do not shield yourself. Casting a helpful ward makes the Fire and Myth heads natural-attack whoever received it.

Keep harmful wards off the Fire head as your win condition - if you trap it, it cleanses all traps off itself. Instead stack blades and Feints on the Myth or Death-boosted line and finish with one AoE that clears all three heads together.
cheatNotes: On round 1 and every 4th round after, the Balance and Myth heads remove all harmful wards from themselves and each head buffs. Burst right after this window, not before.
The Balance head gives itself Donate Power for extra pips.
The Fire head heals itself 250 over 5 rounds (307 with its healing boost).
The Myth head shields itself with three -40% damage wards.
If any wizard casts a helpful ward, the Fire and Myth heads both natural-attack the recipient. Do not shield up.
If you place a harmful ward on the Fire head, it cleanses every trap off itself, wasting your Feints.
